description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python that runs on push and pull requests to master and main branches when files pyproject.toml, .py files, or .github/workflows/python-testing.yml change. The workflow has read permissions to repository contents and cancels in-progress runs of the same workflow. It consists of two jobs: check and tests. The check job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, outputs environment variables, sets up Python 3.8, installs dependencies, and runs checks with tox. The tests job depends on check, runs on multiple OS and Python versions, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs tests with tox.
